notes: Removes the remaining legacy Pathmark light/dark data-attribute styling that could override Streamlit's built-in appearance menu.
Keeps Theme as a top-level tab for seasonal accent only.
Uses Streamlit's own CSS variables for page background, cards, inputs and text so Dark mode should become a true dark page when Streamlit Dark is selected.
Stops applying a default light Pathmark token set from the seasonal theme injector.
Preserves the existing Pathmark seasonal themes and mobile/PWA branding metadata.
release_notes: Removes remaining Pathmark light/dark overrides and lets Streamlit's built-in appearance CSS variables control the actual light or dark page styling.
label: Streamlit-native appearance cleanup
